sign_in.title: Bogga Xamuulaha
sign_in.subtitle: Geli aqoonsigaaga si aad u gasho bogga.

brand.quote: "Lamaanaha ugu isku halayn badan ee xamuulka ganacsigaaga."

terms_dialog.title: Goobta WeTruck – Shuruudaha & Xaaladaha
terms_dialog.subtitle: Fadlan si taxadar leh u akhri shuruudahan ka hor intaadan isticmaalin goobta.
terms_dialog.section_1_content: Markaad gujiso "Waan Aqbalayaa", waxaad xaqiijinaysaa inaad akhriday, fahamtay, oo ku heshiisay masuuliyadaha sida Gaadiid-qaade ama Wakiilka Xamuulka ee Goobta WeTruck. Shuruudahani waxay la jaan qaadaan sharciyada Itoobiya, oo ay ku jirto Bayaanka Gaadiidka Qaababka-badan No. 548/2007.

forgot_password.title: Ilaawtay Furaha Sirta
forgot_password.subtitle: Geli iimeelkaaga waxaana kuu soo dirayaa link si aad u dib u dejiso furahaaga.
forgot_password.success: OTP waxaa loo soo diray iimeelkaaga. Waa lagugu wareejinayaa…

reset_password.title: Dib u Deji Furaha Sirta
reset_password.otp_placeholder: Geli koodka loo soo diray iimeelkaaga
reset_password.success: Furaha si guul leh ayaa loo dib u dejiyay. Waa lagugu wareejinayaa soo galitaanka…

change_password.title: Beddel Furaha Sirta
change_password.subtitle: Geli furahaaga hadda jira oo dooro mid cusub.
change_password.password_hint: Furahu waa inuu ugu yaraan 8 xaraf ahaadaa.

errors.captcha_load_failed: Koodka amniga lama soo rari karo. Fadlan cusboonaysii bogga.
errors.captcha_incorrect: Koodka amniga aad gelisay waa khalad. Fadlan geli koodka cusub.
errors.network_error: Server-ka lama xiriiri karo. Fadlan hubi xiriirkaaga internetka.
errors.invalid_credentials: Iimeelka ama furaha sirta waa khalad. Fadlan hubi aqoonsigaaga.
errors.account_not_found: Akoon leh iimeelkan lama helin. Fadlan hubi iimeelkaaga.
errors.account_disabled: Akoonkaaga waa la joojiyay. Fadlan la xiriir taageerada.
errors.server_error: Khalad server ayaa dhacay. Fadlan daqiiqado ka dib isku day.
errors.too_many_attempts: Isku dayyo badan oo soo galitaan. Fadlan daqiiqado sug.
errors.login_failed: Soo galitaanku wuu guuldareystay. Fadlan hubi aqoonsigaaga.
errors.auth_expired: Waqtigaagii wuu dhacay. Fadlan mar kale soo gal.
errors.validation_error: Khalad xaqiijin. Fadlan hubi waxaad gelisay.
errors.password_reset_failed: Dib u dejinta furaha wuu guuldareystay
errors.password_changed: Furaha si guul leh ayaa loo beddelay
